listeners.purpose: Maps user.registered → marketing_events.event_type='signup'. Deduplication key = 'signup:' + user.id. Runs after commit so unregistered rows don't fire. This is the primary marketing-lane entry point for the signup funnel.
Wave 4 bridge. Maps finance.trial_started → event_type='trial_started'. Dedup key = 'trial:' + subscription.id + ':started'.
Wave 4 bridge. Maps finance.trial_converted → event_type='trial_converted' with value_amount_cents from the plan's price. Dedup key = 'trial:' + subscription.id + ':converted'.
Wave 4 bridge. Maps finance.subscription_started → event_type='subscription_started' with value_amount_cents = plan.price. Dedup key = 'sub:' + subscription.id + ':started'.
Wave 4 bridge. Maps finance.subscription_upgraded → event_type='subscription_upgraded' with value_amount_cents = MRR delta. Dedup key = 'sub:' + subscription.id + ':upgraded:' + new_plan.id.

Wave 4 bridge. Maps finance.subscription_cancelled → event_type='subscription_cancelled'. Dedup key = 'sub:' + subscription.id + ':cancelled'. Signals churn to ad networks so they can adjust targeting.
Wave 4 bridge. Maps finance.membership_purchased → event_type='membership_purchased' with value_amount_cents = membership.price. Dedup key = 'membership:' + membership.id + ':purchased'.

Wave 4 bridge. Maps finance.refund_issued → event_type='refund_issued' with NEGATIVE value_amount_cents (revenue reversal). Providers that support negative-value conversion (Meta CAPI, Google Ads Enhanced Conversions) subtract from ROAS. Dedup key = 'refund:' + refund.id.
Wave 4 bridge. Maps finance.chargeback_filed → event_type='chargeback_filed'. Signals fraud + chargeback loss to ad networks. Dedup key = 'chargeback:' + chargeback.id.

Maps facility.booking_created → event_type='session_booked' WHEN booking.payment_status IN ('paid', 'included_in_membership'). Free bookings do NOT fire (not a conversion signal). Dedup key = 'booking:' + booking.id.
Wave 3 bridge. Maps sports.athlete_enrolled → event_type='athlete_enrolled'. Dedup key = 'athlete:' + athlete.id + ':enrolled:' + enrollment.id.
Wave 3 bridge. Maps sports.event_registered → event_type='event_registered'. Dedup key = 'event_reg:' + event_registration.id.
Maps growth.lead_captured (from contact form / demo request / newsletter signup) → event_type='lead_captured'. Dedup key = 'lead:' + lead.id.
Wave 5 bridge (sibling growth module). Maps referrals.completed → event_type='referral_completed'. Dedup key = 'referral:' + referral.id + ':completed'.

Compliance-critical. Reacts to consent revocation on the `marketing` or `advertising` category. Sweeps pending + dispatching marketing_events for the subject + marks them status='suppressed_by_consent'. Cancels pending DispatchToProviderJobs. This is how the re-check-at-dispatch guarantee is enforced when the delay between capture and dispatch spans a consent revocation.

Marks every marketing_provider_config for the suspended tenant as is_active=false (does NOT soft-delete — restoration on tenant reactivation is one flip away). Fires MarketingProviderDeactivated with reason='tenant_suspended'.
Reverses DeactivateProvidersOnTenantSuspended. Only re-activates configs that were deactivated BY the suspension cascade (checks the audit trail for reason='tenant_suspended').

Cascade delete via FK CASCADE. This listener writes the compliance audit trail entry + emits count metrics (marketing_events purged, marketing_deliveries purged, marketing_provider_configs purged, marketing_dead_letters purged). Also fires cross-provider deletion requests (Meta Data Deletion API, Google Ads user-data deletion) as a best-effort GDPR Art. 17 propagation.

Individual GDPR Art. 17. Nulls subject_id on marketing_events WHERE subject_type='User' AND subject_id=erased_user.id. Fires provider-side deletion requests. Event rows themselves survive (financial retention) with the subject-identifying fields nulled.
